title: Campaign Portfolio Overview
subtitle: Brand & Growth Marketing Projects

paragraphs: Summary overview of Van Anh's campaign portfolio spanning brand launches, social campaigns, growth marketing, and strategic market development across multiple industries and formats.
bullets: Soirée by Sephora — Brand Launch, Nightwear Collection, Vietnam (2024)
AB InBev Market Share Expansion — Market Penetration, Beer Portfolio, Vietnam (2024)
MoMo Super App Growth — Product & Growth Marketing, E-wallet, Vietnam (2024)
Violent vs. Compassionate Communication Framework — CSR/Strategy (2024)
Dyson Love Edition 2026 — Brand Campaign, Home Appliances, Vietnam (2026)
PNJ × TikTok 'Discover My Character' — Social Campaign, Jewellery, Vietnam (2023)
NFT Market Development — New Market Strategy, Vietnam (2023)
Glaze New Product Launch — Growth & Launch, Multi-category (2023)
Last Bite Best Bite — Brand MVP, Airport Food, Vietnam (2023)

summary: Campaign portfolio overview listing 9 marketing projects across brand launch, social, growth, and market strategy — spanning Sephora, AB InBev, MoMo, Dyson, PNJ, and more across Vietnam (2023–2026).
